title: Whoa!
description: Demonstration modpack for Distant Horizons shaders support
body:
## Features
- Performance optimizations included
- Shaders included
- Preconfigured for the looks
- It works on my PC™

## Demo world
Due to Modrinth's file size constraints, I couldn't include a pregenerated demo world in the modpack (because it's 800 MBs). Fortunately, you can download it [here](https://drive.proton.me/urls/62A4C1X50M#y7I3v0A1G8BJ) (click Download All), extract it into an empty directory, and copy it to your saves folder manually. 

## Inculded shaders
- [Bliss Shaders](https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader) by [X0nk](https://modrinth.com/user/X0nk)
- [BSL Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders) by [CaptTatsu](https://modrinth.com/user/CaptTatsu)
- [Complementary Shaders - Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound) by [EminGT](https://modrinth.com/user/EminGT)
- [Photon Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/photon-shader) by [sixthsurge](https://modrinth.com/user/sixthsurge)

## How to play
1. Have a decent computer
2. Install the modpack from Modrinth in your favourite launcher
3. Allocate a minimum of 6-8 GB of RAM
4. It'll probably work. No guarantee though.

## Performance
Depends on the shader and the settings used.
With Photon it runs about 50-70 FPS on an RTX 2060 6GB, but your mileage may vary.

## Disclaimer
**Distant Horizons (a mod included) is alpha software, which may be unstable. Use the modpack at your own risk only.**  
**Do not report bugs directly to any mods included, instead, [email me](mailto:9b866d40-deeb-430e-8f82-fa0dd772b5a7@simplelogin.com) first!**
